core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix environmental urgency with editorial beauty.
Emotion First: The UI must feel grounded, tactile, and hopeful.
Negative Space: Give the map breathing room; avoid cluttered HUDs.
Contrast: Sharp typography against soft, textured topographic maps.
design_philosophy.mood: Empowering, tactile, community-driven, grounded in ecological responsibility.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-forest-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-forest-800
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-forest-500

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Prefer p-6, p-8, p-12 over smaller paddings.
layout_and_spacing.map_dashboard_strategy: The map should be a full-screen bleed element. Floating panels (suitability analysis, layer toggles) must sit on top of the map with 'Glassmorphism' or solid white cards. Mobile UI should utilize a bottom-sheet drag drawer pattern.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid_marketing: Use MODE A: Tetris Grid. Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create asymmetry on the landing page.

surfaces.floating_panels: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#E3DFD5] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(30,40,34,0.08)] rounded-2xl
surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-[#E3DFD5] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
surfaces.map_controls: bg-white border border-[#E3DFD5] shadow-lg rounded-full flex items-center justify-center p-3

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white hover:bg-brand-primary_hover rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-sans font-semibold transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-brand-primary
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-text-primary border border-[#E3DFD5] hover:bg-background-surface_warm rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-sans font-semibold transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E3DFD5] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary focus:border-transparent text-forest-900
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

interactive_motion.hover_states: All buttons/cards must lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow slightly.
interactive_motion.page_transitions: Use smooth opacity fades. Map layers should fade in gracefully.
interactive_motion.accessibility_motion: Wrap animations with standard CSS transitions or framer-motion respect prefers-reduced-motion.

hero_background.description: Abstract topographic map lines in warm sand and terracotta colors. Use as hero background with bg-black/10 overlay for text contrast.

ai_species_recommendation.description: Botanical illustration style of a young sapling. Use in the AI recommendation engine panel or zero-state.

community_feed_1.description: Men planting shrubs. Use in the community layer / feed.

community_feed_2.description: Volunteers cleaning up / planting. Use in the community layer.

satellite_map_texture.description: Aerial view of green grass field. Use as placeholder for map preview cards.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images/gradients meets APCA standards. Use text shadow where needed. Tint greys slightly with warm orange.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="map-layer-toggle"`, `data-testid="plant-tree-cta"`). Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn for the dashboard, heavily customized to match the 'Organic & Earthy' theme.
Integrate Leaflet for the interactive map. The map should cover the full screen with absolute positioned panels over it.
Ensure all fonts used are imported from Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Manrope).
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard SaaS purple/blue gradients.
Implement file structure in Javascript (.js, .jsx). No .tsx.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs (via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the URLs provided in the images_and_media section.
